calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-16-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-14-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Thomas M. Ray, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Courtney Eversole, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Douglas E. Phanco, individually and dba Megavest corporation, or Megavest corporation.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Sheri Rossillo was filed on July 15, 2009.
Defaults were entered against defendants on October 24, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, January 14, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Courteney Eversole, and against the Defaulted Defendants Douglas E. Phanco, individually and dba Megavest corporation, and Megavest corporation as follows:

Damages/Principal - $100,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - 35,275.21.
Costs - $520.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $135,795.21.

Additionally, the Court finds that defendant Douglas E. Phanco committed fraud by making intentional false statements, and used false documents to induce plaintiff to give defendant $50,000.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
